attachments.fallback: How to Convert Eudora Mail to Outlook PST? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: To convert Eudora Mail to Outlook PST, the most reliable approach is to use the MacSonik MBOX Converter, as Eudora stores emails in MBX/MBOX format, which Outlook does not support directly. With this tool, you first locate your Eudora mailbox files (such as In.mbx, Out.mbx, Sent.mbx) on your system and then add them to the MacSonik MBOX Converter using the Add File or Add Folder option. After load…

attachments.text: If you’re looking for reliable ways to transfer emails between Gmail accounts or any other providers, check out SysTools <https://www.systoolsgroup.com/email-migration.html|Email Migration Tool>.
